name: roto-s
description: URL shortener for s.roto.work — Cloudflare Workers + D1 + Hono with a Vite/React admin SPA

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,admin -c blue,magenta "bun --cwd apps/api run dev" "bun --cwd apps/admin run dev"
scripts.deploy: bun run build:admin && bun --cwd apps/api run deploy
scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd apps/api run typecheck && bun --cwd apps/admin run typecheck
scripts.test: bun run test:api && bun run test:admin
